root.name: Create a new slide after slide 8 with the title 'Building Analysis Methods'
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully created a new slide after slide 8, ensured the slide title is correct, and avoided extraneous changes elsewhere in the presentation.

children.name: Slide creation and position
children.description: Checks that a new slide was created and placed immediately after slide 8.

children.name: New slide exists
children.description: Verifies that exactly one new slide was added to the presentation.

children.name: New slide is after slide 8
children.description: Checks that the new slide was inserted immediately after slide 8 (i.e., it is now slide 9).

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    added_slides = ppt_diff.added_slides
    if len(added_slides) != 1:
        return "Can't check position: not exactly one new slide.", 0.0
    new_slide = added_slides[0]
    # Find the original slide 8
    orig_slide_8 = next((s for s in ppt_diff.removed_slides if s.slide_number == 8), None)
    # If slide numbers shifted, check the new slide is numbered 9
    if new_slide.slide_number != 9:
        return f"New slide is at position {new_slide.slide_number}, expected position 9.", 0.0
    return "New slide correctly positioned after slide 8.", 1.0

children.name: Slide title correctness
children.description: Checks that the new slide has the correct title: 'Building Analysis Methods'.

children.name: Title matches expected text
children.description: Verifies that the new slide's title matches 'Building Analysis Methods' (case-insensitive, ignoring extra whitespace).

children.name: No extraneous changes
children.description: Checks that no other modifications were made to slides, transitions, or animations, except for the single new slide addition.

children.name: No other slides changed
children.description: Verifies that no slides other than the new one were added, removed, or modified.

children.name: No extraneous transitions or animations
children.description: Verifies that no transitions or animations were added, removed, or modified anywhere in the presentation.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # All lists should be empty
    if (
        not ppt_diff.added_animations and
        not ppt_diff.removed_animations and
        not ppt_diff.modified_animations and
        not ppt_diff.added_transitions and
        not ppt_diff.removed_transitions and
        not ppt_diff.modified_transitions
    ):
        return "No extraneous transitions or animations.", 1.0
    return "Extraneous transitions or animations detected.", 0.0

metadata.task: Create a new slide after slide 8 with the title 'Building Analysis Methods'
